textByHashes.4ef39829f4d6fae708b09fce160d83cf20226632: What did I do to deserve this?
textByHashes.40649fd58bcf6ac000ef45c598d0b4f168d6bfc6: You're not safe here. Leave while you can.
textByHashes.92d0e6f65af4aafab0fe8f37b2e29040c278f7d4: Eating me... they keep eating me! Eating me from the inside! Please stop them! I can feel them wriggling around inside me right now... please stop them!
textByHashes.593d42cd43fca7eaf01974057ffd9bc80be3ee04: Blood, blood... never enough blood to go round. When I lift up my arm like this, it all pours back into my body.
textByHashes.738fb1bfed20ac7cd802c2a51aed9b9bf3984d4d: I hope it remembers to go back inside my arm. And don't even ask me about my legs... how much blood are they going to need?
textByHashes.b1733fac897a5aebf51a22b3d204734f2089e938: Blood is important. We must offer it to Zamorak every day as proof of our devotion. I just hope I don't run out!
textByHashes.c129193d5d40a205fc67c316d5e2526ac14ab9bb: Oh yes, you're a fine one. Nice red cheeks, shiny hair.
textByHashes.d6222b8de452f310d0e58dd971b5e2a145161a7c: Let's see now, some potatoes, some cabbage... Maybe half a clove of garlic...
textByHashes.5e0e4aca15b8d0f9af946cfc265fef9192988fab: Yes I think you'd make a fine soup. You don't mind do you?
textByHashes.babd19c33deec932a864b494b5ad7d67367240d0: You're welcome to have some with me of course...
textByHashes.a37aeaf3e5ef13131e3e9b0a1d6e16b11e357b0b: Mwaarrr fnnntchh. Gbpp dng sktd delp?
textByHashes.cbec16f7674d3f25b968a31581edf7a2c8e93254: Kjp lar falut: Gbpp dng sktd delp?
textByHashes.d44cb97bd104463c25b826891c832d49e341448f: Mwaarrr fnnntchh. Gbpp dng sktd delp? GBPP DNG SKTD DELP!
textByHashes.9566a9ab4bd90cf06498efd7458bebce85f2ade2: Kill the villagers, burn them all... every last one! I want nothing to survive... nothing but the sweet smell of burning flesh...
textByHashes.e2fcea874466f44d45bf6f734f6c9aad80b60b1a: What's that? You've never smelt it before? Well, let's just say that it's an acquired taste...
textByHashes.a14aefd125bfea5dc19f63243db25f91ab23315c: Danger, everywhere danger! But not from man nor beast! This is the danger that is inside you.
textByHashes.eb5698017b38b531137c2d94fa656aff05a9bba2: Bring it out, nurture it, cherish it. Stroke it like you would stroke a wounded bird... then strangle it before it takes hold of your very being. Don't say I didn't warn you.
textByHashes.c8be9d0112f194199a8bb48b8756b16385f80d1f: What's that... Is that a dagger I see before me? Why should I bear the slings and arrows of outrageous fortune.
textByHashes.4ecacd746969f166df45255c216d5f5ffc3f4273: For what is a man but this quintessence of dust? And so I say goodnight sweet prince. The rest is silence.
